rank_body:
gfloor = max(w, 0.05)
parent_key = (-n_tasks, score / max(n_tasks, 1), -w, score, -w)
key = (len(task_ids), w * score + (1.0 - w) * 100.0, parent_key)
thought: [stub:refine(gen01_E1_001)] operator M1 (gen 1, parent gen01_E1_001). Rank by an objective-aware key for the normal regime: favour bundles only when their coverage gain beats the expected accepted score, protect against the 100/task all-reject penalty via willingness, and break ties on lower score (the objective sums accepted score).
honest_note: Promoted = a real held-out-validated ranking heuristic that beats the SEED ranking baseline; it is NOT stronger than the full solver_v2 pipeline. solver_v3 consumes it as one more argmin candidate and therefore never regresses below solver_v2. R2: the code is an M1 refine of the parent whose dominant term is the documented expected single-point cost w*score+(1-w)*100 (directive 'none' at gen 1); stub mode, no live LLM.
